use_cases: Displaying brand or integration icons on a landing page
Showing app ecosystem or connected services
Featuring social media or developer tool branding
Creating an app launcher or icon gallery interface
Adding visual social proof for platform integrations
ai_summary: A collection of app brand icons (Instagram, GitLab) rendered as SVG with multi-stop gradient fills including the iconic purple-to-orange Instagram rainbow gradient. The component displays multiple app icons in a clean grid layout, designed for showcasing integrations, connected services, or platform ecosystems on landing pages and dashboards.
